2603.25140.title: SAVe: Self-Supervised Audio-visual Deepfake Detection Exploiting Visual Artifacts and Audio-visual Misalignment
2603.25140.paper_summary: Multimodal deepfakes can exhibit subtle visual artifacts and cross-modal inconsistencies, which remain challenging to detect, especially when detectors are trained primarily on curated synthetic forgeries. Such synthetic dependence can introduce dataset and generator bias, limiting scalability and robustness to unseen manipulations. We propose SAVe, a self-supervised audio-visual deepfake detection framework that learns entirely on authentic videos. SAVe generates on-the-fly, identity-preserving, region-aware self-blended pseudo-manipulations to emulate tampering artifacts, enabling the model to learn complementary visual cues across multiple facial granularities. To capture cross-modal evidence, SAVe also models lip-speech synchronization via an audio-visual alignment component that detects temporal misalignment patterns characteristic of audio-visual forgeries. Experiments on FakeAVCeleb and AV-LipSync-TIMIT demonstrate competitive in-domain performance and strong cross-dataset generalization, highlighting self-supervised learning as a scalable paradigm for multimodal deepfake detection.
2603.25140.paper_summary_zh: 多模態深偽技術可能會顯示出微妙的視覺瑕疵和跨模態的不一致性，這些特徵仍然難以檢測，尤其是當檢測器主要在經過精心策劃的合成偽造品上進行訓練時。這種合成依賴性可能引入數據集和生成器偏差，限制了對未見操控的可擴展性和穩健性。我們提出了SAVe，一種自我監督的音視覺深偽檢測框架，完全基於真實視頻進行學習。SAVe即時生成保留身份的、區域感知的自我混合偽操控，以模擬篡改瑕疵，使模型能夠學習跨多種面部細節的互補視覺線索。為了捕捉跨模態證據，SAVe還通過音視覺對齊組件建模唇語同步，檢測音視覺偽造特有的時間錯位模式。在FakeAVCeleb和AV-LipSync-TIMIT上的實驗顯示出具有競爭力的領域內表現和強大的跨數據集泛化能力，突顯了自我監督學習作為多模態深偽檢測的一種可擴展範式。
2603.25140.author: Sahibzada Adil Shahzad et.al.
2603.25140.authors: Sahibzada Adil Shahzad, Ammarah Hashmi, Junichi Yamagishi, Yusuke Yasuda, Yu Tsao, Chia-Wen Lin, Yan-Tsung Peng, Hsin-Min Wang
